footer.v: 1 - Còn sử dụng, 0 - Không còn sử dụng

command.text: declare @siteMethod varchar(1), @unitName nvarchar(1023) select @siteMethod = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_gia_nh_kho' select @siteMethod = isnull(@siteMethod, '0') select @unitName = case when @@language = 'v' then ten_dvcs else ten_dvcs2 end from dmdvcs where ma_dvcs = @@unit select 'this._siteMethod=' + @siteMethod + '; this._unitCode=''' + @@unit + ''';this._unitName=''' + replace(replace(isnull(@unitName, ''), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + '''; initUnitSite(this);active$FormSite(this);' as message return

declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$updateConflict nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512), @$siteGroupConflict nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã kho hàng %s đã có hoặc lồng nhau trong danh mục kho hàng.' else N'The site %s is invalid or already exists.' end select @$updateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã kho hàng %s đã phát sinh, không thể sửa được.' else N'Cannot edit the site %s. It has already been used.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã kho hàng %s đã phát sinh, không thể xóa được.' else N'Cannot delete the site %s. It has already been used.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã kho hàng %s đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The site %s has been modified or deleted by another user.' end select @$siteGroupConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Nhóm kho %s đã khai báo trên đơn vị khác, không cập nhật được.' else N'Cannot update the site group %s. It has already been used by another unit.' end

if exists(select 1 from @@table where ((ma_kho like rtrim(@ma_kho) + '%') or rtrim(@ma_kho) like rtrim(ma_kho) + '%')) begin select 'ma_kho' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_kho)) as message return end
if @ma_nh <> '' and exists(select 1 from @@table where ma_nh = @ma_nh and ma_dvcs <> @ma_dvcs) begin select 'ma_nh' as field, replace(@$siteGroupConflict, '%s', rtrim(@ma_nh)) as message return end
select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID
declare @max int select @max = max(id) + 1 from dmkho update @@table set id = isnull(@max, 1) where ma_kho = @ma_kho

if not exists(select 1 from @@table where ma_kho = $ma_kho.OldValue) begin select 'ma_kho' as field, replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s', rtrim($ma_kho.OldValue)) as message return end
if @ma_kho <> $ma_kho.OldValue begin if exists(select 1 from @@table where ((ma_kho like rtrim(@ma_kho) + '%') or rtrim(@ma_kho) like rtrim(ma_kho) + '%') and ma_kho <> $ma_kho.OldValue) begin select 'ma_kho' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_kho)) as message return end if exists(select 1 from cdvt where ma_kho = $ma_kho.OldValue) or exists(select 1 from ct70 where ma_kho = $ma_kho.OldValue) or exists(select 1 from cdvt2 where ma_kho = $ma_kho.OldValue) or exists(select 1 from ct90 where ma_kho = $ma_kho.OldValue) or exists(select 1 from syssiterights where ma_kho = $ma_kho.OldValue) or exists(select 1 from syssiterights2 where ma_kho = $ma_kho.OldValue) begin select 'ma_kho' as field, replace(@$updateConflict, '%s', rtrim($ma_kho.OldValue)) as message return end end
if @ma_nh <> '' and exists(select 1 from @@table where ma_kho <> $ma_kho.OldValue and ma_nh = @ma_nh and ma_dvcs <> @ma_dvcs) begin select 'ma_nh' as field, replace(@$siteGroupConflict, '%s', rtrim(@ma_nh)) as message return end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ma_kho = @ma_kho

if exists(select 1 from cdvt where ma_kho = @ma_kho) or exists(select 1 from ct70 where ma_kho = @ma_kho) or exists(select 1 from cdvt2 where ma_kho = @ma_kho) or exists(select 1 from ct90 where ma_kho = @ma_kho) or exists(select 1 from syssiterights where ma_kho = @ma_kho) or exists(select 1 from syssiterights2 where ma_kho = @ma_kho) begin select replace(@$deleteConflict, '%s', rtrim(@ma_kho)) as message return end
